title: Kuvara tree

The '''kuvara tree''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that lived on<ref name="RC:HC" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Qiilura system/Legends|Qiilura system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]<ref name="RC:HC" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', including those in which the [[kuvara]] tree was involved, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> They produced a [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]], which was named [[kuvara]] like the tree itself, that was [[Diet/Legends|edible]] by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. The kuvara trees' [[Wood/Legends|wood]] was used in the rare, lavish homes of Qiilura.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kuvara trees appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}
